evaluation_metadata.reference_text: The stale smell of old beer lingers. It takes heat to bring out the odor. A cold dip restores health and zest. A salt pickle tastes fine with ham. Tacos al pastor are my favorite. A zestful food is the hot cross bun.
evaluation_metadata.hardware: 2 CPU cores, no GPU, 7.7 GB RAM

models.transcription: The stale smell of old beer lingers. It takes heat to bring out the odor. A cold deep restores health and zest. A salt pickle tastes fine with ham. Tacos al pasta are my favorite. A zestful food is the hot cross bun.
